title: Schiedeella trilineata
taxonomy: Schiedeella trilineata is classified as a species of orchid in the family Orchidaceae. This flowering plant is native to Mexico and belongs to the genus Schiedeella. Within the Orchidaceae family, Schiedeella trilineata is further classified into the subfamily Epidendroideae. The subfamily Epidendroideae is one of the largest and most diverse groups within the Orchidaceae family. Further classification may include tribe and subtribe levels within the Epidendroideae subfamily.
